channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules
item.description: 📄 A curated list of awesome .cursorrules files

item.title: n8n-io/self-hosted-ai-starter-kit
item.description: The Self-hosted AI Starter Kit is an open-source template that quickly sets up a local AI environment. Curated by n8n, it provides essential tools for creating secure, self-hosted AI workflows.

item.title: deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-Coder-V2
item.description: DeepSeek-Coder-V2: Breaking the Barrier of Closed-Source Models in Code Intelligence

item.title: steven2358/awesome-generative-ai
item.description: A curated list of modern Generative Artificial Intelligence projects and services

item.title: ml-tooling/best-of-ml-python
item.description: 🏆 A ranked list of awesome machine learning Python libraries. Updated weekly.

item.title: emmabostian/developer-portfolios
item.description: A list of developer portfolios for your inspiration

item.title: DopplerHQ/awesome-interview-questions
item.description: A curated awesome list of lists of interview questions. Feel free to contribute! 🎓

item.title: skills/hello-github-actions
item.description: Create a GitHub Action and use it in a workflow.

item.title: awesome-foss/awesome-sysadmin
item.description: A curated list of amazingly awesome open-source sysadmin resources.

item.title: SimplifyJobs/New-Grad-Positions
item.description: A collection of full time roles in SWE, Quant, and PM for new grads.

item.title: ossu/computer-science
item.description: 🎓 Path to a free self-taught education in Computer Science!

item.title: ossu/math
item.description: 🧮 Path to a free self-taught education in Mathematics!
